hero.subtitle: The all-in-one platform for US real estate agents

multiTenant.description: Each organization gets their own branded site with custom domain support.

analytics.description: Track performance, monitor engagement, and optimize your marketing.

propertyManagement.description: List and manage properties with energy ratings, MLS integration, and US address lookup

photos.description: Organize, reorder, and manage property photos with drag-and-drop ease.

campaigns.description: Create automated email sequences with customizable delays between messages.

logo.description: Upload your logo and customize colors to match your brand.

site.description: A beautiful, SEO-optimized website for your property listings.

sharing.description: Optimized previews when properties are shared on social media.

email.intro: For general inquiries and technical support, email us at:

gdpr.title: Data Protection Requests
gdpr.description: Exercise your rights under applicable privacy laws
gdpr.intro: Under applicable state and federal privacy laws, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data. You can also object to processing or request restrictions on how we use your data.
gdpr.response: We will respond to your request within 30 days as required by applicable law. In complex cases, we may extend this by up to 60 days with notice.

rights.title: Your Privacy Rights:
rights.access: Right of Access: Request a copy of your personal data
rights.rectification: Right to Correction: Correct inaccurate data
rights.erasure: Right to Deletion: Request deletion of your data
rights.restriction: Right to Restriction: Limit how we use your data
rights.portability: Right to Portability: Receive your data in a portable format
rights.object: Right to Object: Object to certain types of processing

gdpr.complaint: If you are not satisfied with our response, you may lodge a complaint with the
